Node Exporter runs on a target machine</strong> (e.g., Linux server).</p><ul data-end="1811" data-start="1629"><li class="" data-end="1690" data-start="1629"><p class="" data-end="1690" data-start="1631">It exposes metrics in <code data-end="1663" data-start="1653">/metrics</code> endpoint on port <strong data-end="1689" data-start="1681">9100</strong>.</p></li><li class="" data-end="1811" data-start="1694"><p class="" data-end="1811" data-start="1696">Metrics are available in Prometheus text format (e.g., <code data-end="1775" data-start="1751">node_cpu_seconds_total</code>, <code data-end="1803" data-start="1777">node_memory_Active_bytes</code>, etc.).</p></li></ul>" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontStyle=2;align=left;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="870" y="-20" width="390" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PJg4duIj7-_sx38kt2Di-38" value="<div style=""><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"> to scrape from </span><code data-end="1876" data-start="1860" style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">localhost:9100</code><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"> or </span><code data-end="1895" data-start="1880" style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">targetIP:9100</code><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">.</span></div>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontStyle=2;rotation=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="350" y="208" width="470" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PJg4duIj7-_sx38kt2Di-39" value="<strong data-end="2096" data-start="2071">3. Prometheus pulls data</strong> every <code data-end="2120" data-start="2103">scrape_interval</code> (e.g., 15s)&nbsp;<div>by making an <strong data-end="2166" data-start="2146">HTTP GET request</strong> to <code data-end="2198" data-start="2170">http://target:9100/metrics</code>.</div>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="350" y="401" width="400" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PJg4duIj7-_sx38kt2Di-40" value="<strong data-start="2287" data-end="2317">5. width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PJg4duIj7-_sx38kt2Di-44" value="" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="820" y="406" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="957.79" y="405.5" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PJg4duIj7-_sx38kt2Di-49" value="<h2 data-start="155" data-end="187" class="">📦 What is <strong data-start="169" data-end="186">Node Exporter</strong>?</h2><p data-start="189" data-end="309" class=""><strong data-start="189" data-end="206">Node Exporter</strong> is a <strong data-start="212" data-end="235">Prometheus exporter</strong> that collects&nbsp;</p><p data-start="189" data-end="309" class="">hardware and OS-level metrics from <em data-start="285" data-end="292">Linux</em> systems such as:</p><ul data-start="311" data-end="437"><li data-start="311" data-end="324" class=""><p data-start="313" data-end="324" class="">✅ CPU usage</p></li><li data-start="325" data-end="341" class=""><p data-start="327" data-end="341" class="">✅ Memory stats</p></li><li data-start="342" data-end="354" class=""><p data-start="344" data-end="354" class="">✅ Disk I/O</p></li><li data-start="355" data-end="375" class=""><p data-start="357" data-end="375" class="">✅ Filesystem usage</p></li><li data-start="376" data-end="397" class=""><p data-start="378" data-end="397" class="">✅ Network bandwidth</p></li><li data-start="398" data-end="420" class=""><p data-start="400" data-end="420" class="">✅ System uptime/load</p></li><li data-start="421" data-end="437" class=""><p data-start="423" data-end="437" class="">✅ Process info</p></li></ul>" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="90" width="340" height="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.p: 1. Node Exporter runs on a target machine (e.g., Linux server).

li.p: It exposes metrics in /metrics endpoint on port 9100.
Metrics are available in Prometheus text format (e.g., node_cpu_seconds_total, node_memory_Active_bytes, etc.).

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 243px; margin-left: 322px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 441px; margin-left: 322px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
3. Prometheus pulls data every scrape_interval (e.g., 15s)
by making an HTTP GET request to http://target:9100/metrics.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 227px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
5. Grafana queries Prometheus using its API
and visualizes the metrics in dashboards.
